name: Lightstep
description: Lightstep — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Distributed Tracing.

seo.title: Lightstep Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Lightstep analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Lightstep is a Performance Monitoring / APM tool.
pros: Pinpoints performance bottlenecks with distributed tracing
cons: Per-host or per-seat pricing grows quickly with team size
review.best_for: Teams debugging latency and reliability issues
review.not_for: Simple scripts or batch jobs with no latency SLA

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
